changes.comment: fix(portal): PortalEvmDataSource now honours StreamRequest.to — a bounded getStream/getFinalizedStream call terminates at `to` instead of ignoring it and following the chain head. This matches the RPC data source, so the two DataSource implementations agree on where a bounded stream ends. The production run() path is unaffected (it bounds via request ranges and never passes `to`); direct DataSource API consumers passing `to` were.
